title: Workform Owner Appears on Workform
excerpt:
How do I remove my name from appearing on the Workform? 
I don’t want my name to show as the Owner of the Workform. I create forms for our entire team and don’t want clients asking for me if they have a question on the f…

posts.author: JHarrington (Jen H)
posts.cookedHtml:
How do I remove my name from appearing on the Workform?

I don’t want my name to show as the Owner of the Workform. I create forms for our entire team and don’t want clients asking for me if they have a question on the form.

image630×341 8.21 KB

How do I remove this?

Thank you

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: My bad, I realized it actually just shows the user, not the creator. ie I have forms that I created, just had someone test and when they look at it, it shows their profile photo

posts.author: JHarrington (Jen H)
posts.cookedHtml: Well I feel like an idiot. Thank you!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Don’t feel that way, I didn’t realize it either.
